text:
"Destiny" is a song from the film Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance. It is track 5 in the album Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance Original Soundtrack, disc 2.

In the film, the song is featured as the Evangelion pilots chase after the rapidly descending Eighth Angel.

Lyrics

 
I stand and I wait, for me destiny is here, 
and I know it must be.

I have to await, my fate is as pure as snow 
and as sure as can be.
